nasb.text: For because of this you also pay taxes, for rulers are servants of God, devoting themselves to this very thing.

esv.text: For because of this you also pay taxes, for the authorities are ministers of God, attending to this very thing.

cnv.text: 因此，你們也當納稅，因為他們是　神的差役，專責處理這事的。

ccb.text: 你们纳税也是为了同样的缘故，因为官长是上帝的仆人，负责管理这类事务。

csbs.text: 其实你们纳税，也是为了这缘故；因为他们是神的仆役，正是为此专心服事。
